project_type: Claude Code plugin / autonomous development harness
mode: v0.8.7 quality-90 multi-wave rescore; release blocked because adversarial tracks did not agree on >=90
scores_source: Claude wave4 conservative rescore lower-bound; Codex final rerun blocked by quota after Codex r1 rejected at 87.33

type_safety.notes: mypy strict expanded to 49 files / 14 vault pilots, but Any density remains high.

test_quality.notes: 611 root + 106 vault tests; scripts coverage 87.50%; parametrization still sparse.

error_handling.notes: broad exceptions reduced 30 -> 8, with remaining broad catches in core boundaries.

code_structure.notes: long functions reduced 34 -> 11; largest remaining prepare_subagent_ticket at 69 lines.

logging.notes: print calls reduced 168 -> 50; event() calls 37 -> 56; structured logging remains uneven.

async_correctness.notes: Claude track flagged subprocess timeout risk; PM AST recount finds only two production Popen sites without timeout kwarg, both watchdog-bounded, but final adversarial agreement not obtained.

documentation.notes: Docs gates pass; public docstring coverage remains incomplete.

security.notes: gitleaks and pip-audit CI gates present; small shell=True/eval-scope concerns remain.

architecture.notes: Clean helper modules and adapter protocol; broad DI boundary not systemic.

performance_budget.notes: pytest-benchmark/RSS gates exist; p95/p99 coverage absent.

llm_prompt_quality.notes: Prompt files/schemas/fixtures exist; eval coverage remains thin.

ci_cd_quality.notes: CI coverage floor raised 75 -> 80 after Claude critique; hosted CI not yet run for this branch.

measurement_log.pytest: python3 -m pytest tests/ -q => 611 passed; cd vault && python3 -m pytest tests/ -q => 106 passed
measurement_log.ruff: python3 -m ruff check scripts/ tests/ hooks/ vault/ => clean before final CI-only YAML floor edit; focused CI workflow test passed after edit
measurement_log.hooks_bats_docs_graphify: hook selftests 13/13, 9/9, 9/9; bats 40/40 and 47/47; module-size OK; doc-reference OK; graphify loop 27/27
measurement_log.codex: Codex r1 .planning/quality/eval-codex-8.json = 87.33 REJECT_FOR_90_TARGET; final rerun blocked by Codex quota and recorded in .planning/quality/codex-8-final/
measurement_log.decision: Stop before release; no v0.8.7 tag/release/plugin update until adversarial rescore reaches >=90.

residual_risks: No dual-track agreement on >=90; final Codex rerun was quota-blocked.
Adversarial tracks still penalize Any density, sparse parametrization, uneven structured logging, and remaining long core functions.
Hosted CI has not run for this branch after the CI coverage floor change.
